hero.title: Stop selling your lessons in WhatsApp groups
hero.subtitle: An all-in-one platform that protects your videos from theft and manages your students' subscriptions automatically. Focus on teaching, we handle the rest.

drmSection.heading: Full DRM protection for your content

encrypted.title: Encrypted streaming
encrypted.desc: The video can't be recorded or downloaded.

instantBan.desc: Automatic ban on any screen-recording attempt.

payments.heading: You teach. We collect the money.
payments.subtitle: Collecting your earnings is easier than ever. Multiple payment methods for every student, and instant transfer to your bank or wallet.
payments.cardsDesc: Print top-up cards with unique codes and hand them out at centers or bookshops so students without an e-wallet can pay easily.
payments.note: Instant transfer to your bank or wallet with no delay.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start with confidence.
faq.a1: Absolutely. Your content stays 100% yours. We only provide the platform and tools to protect and sell it safely. We claim no rights over your videos or materials.
faq.a2: Students pay however suits them — InstaPay, Fawry, Vodafone Cash, Visa, or top-up cards — and the lesson activates instantly.
faq.a3: Your videos are DRM-encrypted with a per-student watermark, and we block any screen-recording attempt.
faq.a4: Not at all. If you can send a video on WhatsApp, you can use Elemni — and our team helps you set up.
faq.a5: We're still finalising our plans. Talk to us and we'll put together an offer that fits your student numbers and your content.
faq.q6: Can I migrate my current students?
faq.a6: Yes — our team migrates your students and videos within 48 hours, free if you have more than 50 students.

finalCta.heading: Your first lecture is 10 minutes away
finalCta.subtitle: Start your digital teaching journey easily, no complications.
